issues.description: Card has two distinct effects but effects array is empty. Must include: (1) Blocker counter effect, (2) DON x1 protection effect
Missing Blocker effect: trigger=Counter, condition for opponent attack declaration, action to rest this card and redirect attack target
Missing DON protection effect: trigger=OnKO (or similar), condition checking if attacker lacks ＜Special＞ attribute, action to prevent KO

effects.description: After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack
This Character cannot be K.O.'d by effects of Characters without the ＜Special＞ attribute
